text.title: onboarding Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for onboarding as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Documentation-as-onboarding: assigning a new hire a reading list without synchronous context.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: New hires do not read documentation as a primary learning mode; it is a reference, not an onboarding mechanism. An agent piping docs is a worse experience than a human explanation.

failure-mode.description: Buddy program with no check-in cadence or scope definition.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Buddy relationships degrade silently when buddies stop checking in; without a scheduled first meeting and defined scope, the buddy becomes a name on a form.
